proposed_entries.title: Memory store uses per-entry markdown with YAML frontmatter, not SQLite
proposed_entries.body: Per D4 from chat-capture-learn-optimize plan: memory/<type>/<id>.md with YAML frontmatter is the canonical format. Git-friendly, diffable, human-readable. SQLite layer added only if query patterns demand it later.
proposed_entries.auto_promote_reason: type 'rule' not in allowlist {vendor-fact, do-not-repeat, bug-pattern}

proposed_entries.title: Memory telemetry is local-only, configurable disable
proposed_entries.body: memory/usage.jsonl is append-only and never transmitted off-device. Disable entirely with MEMORY_TELEMETRY=off env var.
proposed_entries.auto_promote_reason: type 'rule' not in allowlist {vendor-fact, do-not-repeat, bug-pattern}
